revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:R from book]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2509 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from book
  |name=From a book
  |from=a book title
  |to=a more general, relevant article, such as the author or publisher of the book or to its title in an alternative language
  |info=** Books should only have an individual article when they meet [[Wikipedia:Notability (books)|Wikipedia's notability guidelines]] and there is enough material to warrant a detailed article.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|noitalics||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{italic title}}}}}}
  |main category=Redirects from books
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from book
  |name=From a book
  |from=a book title
  |to=a more general, relevant article, such as the author or publisher of the book or to its title in an alternative language
  |info=** Books should only have an individual article when they meet [[Wikipedia:Notability (books)|Wikipedia's notability guidelines]] and there is enough material to warrant a detailed article.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|noitalics||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{italic title}}}}}}
  |main category=Redirects from books
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from book

  |to=a more general, relevant article, such as the author or publisher of the book or to its title in an alternative language

  |info=** Books should only have an individual article when they meet [[Wikipedia:Notability (books)|Wikipedia's notability guidelines]] and there is enough material to warrant a detailed article.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|noitalics||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{italic title}}}}}}

  |name=From a book
  |from=a book title
  |to=a more general, relevant article, such as the author or publisher of the book or to its title in an alternative language

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}

  |id=R from book
  |name=From a book

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from book |name=From a book |from=a book title |to=a more general, relevant article, such as the author or publisher of the book or to its title in an alternative language |info=** Books should only have an individual article when they meet [[Wikipedia:Notability (books)|Wikipedia's notability guidelines]] and there is enough material to warrant a detailed article.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|noitalics||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{italic title}}}}}} |main category=Redirects from books |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from book |name=From a book |from=a book title |to=a more general, relevant article, such as the author or publisher of the book or to its title in an alternative language |info=** Books should only have an individual article when they meet [[Wikipedia:Notability (books)|Wikipedia's notability guidelines]] and there is enough material to warrant a detailed article.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|noitalics||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{italic title}}}}}} |main category=Redirects from books |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from book |name=From a book |from=a book title |to=a more general, relevant article, such as the author or publisher of the book or to its title in an alternative language |info=** Books should only have an individual article when they meet [[Wikipedia:Notability (books)|Wikipedia's notability guidelines]] and there is enough material to warrant a detailed article.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|noitalics||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{italic title}}}}}} |main category=Redirects from books |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
